title: MCS Sky Palace 2

ingest_warnings: 1.17+ downsample applied to 2 block ids: minecraft:calcite->minecraft:diorite, minecraft:jigsaw->minecraft:stone

description:
This large, rectangular building, roughly 17x22 cells and two stories high, is constructed with a distinctive Chinese fantasy architectural style. The exterior features a light tan and birch plank base, providing a warm and natural foundation. Above this, the structure is framed with stripped oak logs, creating a visible skeletal structure that adds to its aesthetic. The roof is a complex arrangement of red concrete tiles, featuring both a hip roof section and an area with a more intricate, multi-tiered design, suggesting a pagoda-like influence. Grey stone brick slabs are used to create decorative ridge crests and finials along the roofline, adding a touch of elegance and detail. The overall impression is one of a grand and ornate structure, possibly a palace or temple, with a strong emphasis on traditional Chinese design elements.

The interior of this two-storey building is designed with a clear distinction between levels, likely dedicating the lower floor to common areas and the upper floor to more private spaces. While specific room types are not detailed, the visible structure suggests an open-plan layout on the ground floor, supported by the prominent stripped oak log columns. The upper level seems to house one or more rooms, possibly accessed by an internal staircase, though none is explicitly visible. Lighting within the structure appears to be provided by a combination of natural light filtering through open sections and artificial sources like glowstone or similar blocks, visible as yellow accents. The overall atmosphere conveyed is one of stateliness and cultural significance, evoking the grandeur of a Chinese palace or a similar ceremonial building.
